subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm and steadfast! The events here continue as before. The delegation hath returned, and there were several matters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت راسخ حوادث اینجا بر وجه سابقست هیئت مراجعت نمودند مسائل چندی بود
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @non-participation in politics, @review of publications
